findings.description: PascalCase class names from the configuration table are missing from hints: `ReceivedMessage` (type of messageReader property: `DataReader<ReceivedMessage>`), `DataReader` (generic container type), `FwHeaderDefinition` (type of fwHeaderDefinition property), `StandardFwHeaderDefinition` (default value of fwHeaderDefinition property).
findings.source_evidence: 設定項目一覧 table: messageReader row lists type `DataReader<ReceivedMessage>`; fwHeaderDefinition row lists type `FwHeaderDefinition` and default `StandardFwHeaderDefinition`
